title: Reference Identity Portrait 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: image-to-image identity-safe transformation for fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile. Subject: fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile remains the recognizable source subject while being transformed into polished editorial transformation with recognizable pose, clean anatomy, refined detail, and premium finish. Scene: storybook garden path with soft flowers, warm sky, gentle depth, and cheerful decorative atmosphere supplies the new environment and atmosphere while preserving the source pose, silhouette, and composition logic. Composition: Preserve the reference image pose, framing, body proportions, object placement, and main silhouette as the fixed image-to-image structure. Style: Polished identity-safe transformation with high fidelity to the source reference, clean anatomy, refined detail, and premium finish. Color Palette: Use a cohesive palette that supports the target scene while keeping the reference subject readable. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; keep the transformed subject and setting visually dominant. Signature Elements: fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile, polished editorial transformation with recognizable pose, clean anatomy, refined detail, and premium finish, storybook garden path with soft flowers, warm sky, gentle depth, and cheerful decorative atmosphere, and yellow raincoat, white sneakers, small corgi, canvas tote, and simple reference-consistent accessories define the image-to-image transformation. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
